g.text: INT4 Memory Layout: Packing Two Weights Per Byte
Quantization Mapping: Signed INT4 -> Unsigned Storage

ul.li: Format: INT4 Quantized (Asymmetric with zero-point offset 8).
Alignment: 64-byte aligned (Cache Line) for AVX-512/AMX compatibility.
